title: Toxocarpus longistigma

It is a genus of flowering plants that is native to tropical Asia. The classification of Toxocarpus longistigma includes the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plants. This plant is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta, which includes flowering plants. The classification of Toxocarpus longistigma is rounded out with its order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the coffee and gentian families.
